news.title: Christiane uit Merksem is ‘Bomma van het Jaar’ in Antwerpen: beste handgerolde balletjes in tomatensoep | Foto - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Christiane from Merksem has won "Bomma of the Year" in Antwerp for her exceptional handrolled meatballs in tomato soup. This traditional Belgian comfort food spot is recognized as the best in the city for this classic dish. Visitors to Antwerp looking for authentic, home-style Belgian cuisine should seek out Christiane's restaurant for what locals consider the finest version of this beloved classic.
